span.p: Does the supervisor consume the portfolio report at a regular meeting?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the current cron timing produce a fresh report before that meeting?

span.p: Maintain current cadence - it is aligned with the review rhythm

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the report checked more often than the cron fires?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Increase cron frequency - or add the on-demand portfolio-refresh command to the workflow

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the report data stale when it is eventually read?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Maintain cron frequency but shorten collection window to reduce staleness for the read cadence
